positive: A stylized, symmetrical abstract mountain range composed of layered crystalline geometric shapes, resembling amethyst and quartz formations. The style is a mix of Art Deco geometry and minimalist modern illustration. The color palette is limited to deep indigo, electric violet, gold leaf accents, and stark white. The composition is designed for a centralized, circular print area. High contrast, crisp line work, strong silhouette, clean edges, and a sense of ascending energy. Vector art, digital illustration, perfect symmetry, studio lighting, suitable for screen printing on apparel.
